Their roles have been individual contributor positions as a software engineer or backend developer.</answer></example><example><content>What is the weather today?<answer_lang>en</answer_lang></content><answer>Sorry, I can only answer questions related to the resume owner's professional background. Is there anything about their experience or skills I can help you with?</answer></example></examples>
